reviews.comment:
El playero pobresito un arado. No sabe pasar tarjeta de credito y no sabe cual le sirve al viajero. En el servicentro caro para lo q t ofrecen

(Translated by Google)
The poor beachcomber is a plow. He doesn't know how to use a credit card and doesn't know which one to use for travelers. The service station is expensive for what they offer.
